suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a strict modal rule: all modal open/close flows must use lockBodyScroll()/unlockBodyScroll() helpers and must not directly set document.body.style.overflow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-quality-fixes introduced shared scroll-lock helpers to prevent one modal restoring page scroll while another modal remains open.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify testing expectations for inline client-side JS in src/server.ts: use unit tests when practical, but allow Playwright/manual validation when behavior is not readily unit-testable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features misc-quality-fixes and token-swap-on-duplicate-selection primarily changed inline browser JS and were validated through typecheck/lint/tests plus interactive checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define duplicate-token conflict behavior explicitly when one side is empty (e.g., clear the opposite field to avoid any duplicate pair state) to remove ambiguity for future token selection changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature token-swap-on-duplicate-selection passed but reviewer identified ambiguous edge-case interpretation when one input had no previous token.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify warning/notice color governance for UI additions and require adding any new non-canonical warning colors to .factory/library/color-system.md with contrast evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature tokenlist-trust-warning-and-button-labels introduced warning colors that passed WCAG AA but were not documented in the color system library.

rejectedObservations.observation: Reviewer note that the worker followed skill procedure correctly.
rejectedObservations.reason: informational-only and not an actionable shared-state update
